calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Klaus Biesenbach, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. At the request of the plaintiff, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Klaus Biesenbach, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. Sanction issued on June 04,2024 is vacated by the court. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to November 05, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610.Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Jul-25-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KLAUS BIESENBACH's Motion To Quash Sanctions And Motion To Dismiss.

off calendar. Motion to be determined via ex parte application in dept 610 pursuant to local rules.

Mtn To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KLAUS BIESENBACH's Motion To Amend Complaint.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to amend complaint" is granted; as amended, the "San Francisco Housing Authority" is the sole defendant.

Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order that is verbatin to the court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
